Vehicle.Speed.description: Vehicle speed as reported by the Powertrain ECU.

Vehicle.Powertrain.TractionBattery.State.description: Current state of charge of the high-voltage traction battery, as a percentage of full capacity. Reported by the Battery Management System (BMS). COVESA VSS 4.x standard path (migrated from Vehicle.Battery.SoC in M1/M2).
